item.title: Sensex Drops Over 860 Points as Market Breadth Weakens Amid Sectoral Sell-Off
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a broad-based decline on 13 Mar 2026, with the Sensex plunging 863.24 points (-1.14%) to close at 75,171.18, reflecting persistent selling pressure across sectors. Market breadth was notably weak as only 2 out of 38 sectors advanced, signalling cautious investor sentiment amid global uncertainties and domestic headwinds. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Decline Amid Weak Market Breadth
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable decline recently, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Over the past five days, the index has slipped by 0.34%, while the year-to-date performance shows a sharper fall of 1.69%, signalling cautious investor sentiment towards this high-volatility segment. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Decline Amid Defensive-Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.26% on the day and shedding 2.56% over the past five trading days. This downturn reflects a broad-based retreat with defensive and cyclical stocks displaying contrasting trends, while heavyweight movers have seen mixed technical upgrades and downgrades. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Decline Amid Sectoral Divergence
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, has experienced notable weakness in recent trading sessions, declining by 1.68% on the day and 1.43% over the past five days. This downturn reflects a broader market correction, with sectoral performances and stock-specific movements contributing to the subdued sentiment. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Indiqube Spaces Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Indiqube Spaces Ltd has reached a new all-time low of Rs.150.75 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid a sustained period of underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. The stock’s recent trajectory reflects a challenging environment for the company, with multiple financial and technical indicators underscoring the severity of its current position. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Crizac Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Crizac Ltd’s share price plunged to a new all-time low of ₹204.40 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid a sustained bearish trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames, reflecting ongoing pressures despite the company’s strong financial metrics and growth in profits. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Ajax Engineering Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Ajax Engineering Ltd’s stock plummeted to a fresh all-time low of Rs.461 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting a challenging phase for the company within the automobile industry. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Indegene Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Indegene Ltd, a healthcare services company, has reached a new all-time low price of ₹438.45 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its recent market performance. The stock has been on a consistent decline, reflecting a challenging period for the company amid broader sector movements. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has reached a new all-time low of Rs. 98.5 on 13 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has been on a consistent downward trajectory, reflecting a challenging period for the company amid broader market pressures and sectoral headwinds. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: HP Adhesives Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: HP Adhesives Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has recorded a new all-time low of Rs.31.10 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind key benchmarks, reflecting a challenging period for the company amid subdued financial results and bearish technical indicators. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Go Fashion (India) Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Go Fashion (India) Ltd plunged to a fresh all-time low of Rs. 267 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended decline. The garment and apparel company has experienced a sustained downtrend, underperforming its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Sapphire Foods India Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Sapphire Foods India Ltd’s stock plunged to a fresh all-time low of Rs.162.25 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices consistently, reflecting persistent pressures on its financial and market performance. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Latent View Analytics Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Latent View Analytics Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, recorded a new all-time low of Rs.288.5 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid a sustained bearish trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames, reflecting ongoing pressures in its market valuation and price momentum. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Heranba Industries Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Heranba Industries Ltd, a player in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, has reached a new all-time low of Rs.180.45, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s recent performance reflects sustained pressures, with losses extending over multiple time frames and a deteriorating financial profile. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Bhaskar Agrochemicals Ltd Hits All-Time High at Rs.169.65
item.description: Bhaskar Agrochemicals Ltd, a key player in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, reached a new all-time high of Rs.169.65 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its market journey. This peak reflects the company’s robust performance over recent periods, supported by sustained growth and positive financial trends. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: G G Engineering Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of G G Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, have declined to an all-time low of Rs.0.45 as of 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock's downward trajectory amid persistent financial headwinds and subdued market performance. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Rossari Biotech Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Rossari Biotech Ltd, a player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has recorded a new all-time low of Rs.447.8 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind key benchmarks, reflecting persistent downward pressure amid a challenging market environment. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Indigo Paints Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Indigo Paints Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing at Rs 804.75 on 13 Mar 2026, just 0.3% above its 52-week low of Rs 804.6. The stock’s recent performance reflects a sustained downward trajectory, underperforming its sector and benchmark indices over multiple time frames. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Murae Organisor Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Murae Organisor Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, have declined to an all-time low of Rs.0.20 as of 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended downward trajectory despite recent positive quarterly earnings. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: SRU Steels Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: SRU Steels Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has reached a new all-time low of Rs.1.48 on 13 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing decline. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices substantially, reflecting persistent downward momentum over multiple timeframes. Time: 37 minutes ago
